_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every generated audio asset. Consumed by the Python generator (scripts/sunoapi/) AND the Node codegen (scripts/audio/gen-bindings.js → client/src/audio.generated.ts). Never hand-edit audio.generated.ts; edit here and run `npm run audio`. `descriptor` is the UNIQUE per-asset prompt fragment combined with theme.json palettes — not the whole prompt. `output` is repo-relative; the client loads it at './'+(output without leading 'assets/'). `placeholder` (sfx) names an existing synth WAV in assets/sfx/ to fall back to until the .mp3 is generated. `priority`: 'must' = first generation batch (--only must), 'nice' = later. See docs/AUDIO_PIPELINE.md.

music.title: Caves of Steel
music.descriptor: slow haunting title theme, a fragile music-box melody over a cold steel-city drone, the calm dread before the escape

music.title: Quiet Corridors
music.descriptor: seamless exploration loop, a quiet steady pulse over distant machinery, a soft ticking sequencer keeping it moving, watchful and cold, never quite resolving

music.title: Something Noticed
music.descriptor: rising tension loop, a quickening pulsing sub-bass and ticking detuned bells, an insistent low arpeggio building underneath, cold and uneasy

music.title: Hunted
music.descriptor: high-threat panic loop, a fast driving sub-bass heartbeat, hammering muted mechanical percussion and shrieking metallic textures, relentless and claustrophobic

music.title: Sealed
music.descriptor: oppressive lockdown loop, a low droning klaxon-like swell pulsing under grinding steel and a slow pounding mechanical thud, heavy and inescapable

music.title: Out
music.descriptor: short bittersweet victory sting, a fragile ascending music-box phrase opening into cold reverberant air, relief tinged with unease

music.title: Caught
music.descriptor: short grim defeat sting, a sudden detuned downward swell ending in a cold hard mechanical snap, final and bleak

music.title: Steel Hum
music.descriptor: barely-there ambient under-bed, a near-silent steel hum and faraway drips, pure atmosphere, almost subliminal

sfx.descriptor: a single sharp rising alert chirp, cold synthetic two-note detection tone with a quick metallic edge
a fast looping mechanical pursuit rhythm, rapid servo footsteps over a low aggressive motor hum, relentless and driving
a single heavy robotic footstep on steel floor, servo whine then a metallic clank
two quick anxious electronic warning beeps rising sharply in pitch, tense and escalating
a harsh looping facility lockdown klaxon, cold industrial alarm blaring through steel corridors
a descending all-clear chime, three cool synthetic tones settling downward, calm and resolved
a heavy steel blast door slamming and bolting shut, deep mechanical thud and a final ominous latch clank
a heavy gate unsealing and grinding open, a hydraulic hiss then slow rolling steel and a final settling clank
a short cool notification chime, a single clean bright synthetic tick with a soft tail
a short satisfying flourish, a quick rising arpeggio of cold synth bells resolving cleanly
a short flat denied buzzer, a low dissonant electronic double-honk, blunt and negative
a quick light pickup blip, a soft short upward synthetic chirp
a warm positive confirmation, two friendly rounded tones rising a soft major third, gentle and rounded
a sad soft descending tone fading out, a gentle downward two-note fall, wistful
a seamless ambient facility bed, low steel hum, distant servo whines and faint electrical crackle, unsettling room tone
a sharp cold capture impact, a robotic clamp seizing, metallic snap with a low thud
a harsh negative error buzz, a cold dissonant electronic rejection
a clean positive confirmation, two cool rising synthetic tones, action accepted
a low ominous electrical power-up hum with intermittent crackle and arcing, building voltage in a dormant steampunk transfer chamber
a sharp electrical spark crack, a high-voltage arc snapping between conduits as the consciousness transfer fires
